title: Failure Lens - PR-scoped CI triage with stage-aware log distillation
non_goals: Replacing Forge CI runners or pipeline execution infrastructure
Auto-merging or auto-fixing code without explicit engineer confirmation in v1
Full log archival or long-term observability platform (Datadog replacement)
Non-Forge SCM providers beyond GitHub/GitLab/Jenkins in v1
acceptance_checks: Failed run distills log volume by >=90% while retaining stage-attributed error lines
Green-baseline diff highlights only lines absent or changed vs last successful run on same branch
PR attribution links failure stage to files changed in the triggering PR
Root-cause summary renders in PR check annotation with confidence band and suggested next action
False-positive rate on seeded fixtures stays below 15% for known failure classes
summary: Give Forge teams a provider-agnostic failure intelligence layer that diffs failed pipeline runs against the last green baseline, distills 10K-170K log lines down to stage-relevant errors, attributes failures to PR changes, and surfaces actionable root-cause narratives in PR checks and IDE - collapsing mean time to diagnosis from 30-60 minutes to under five minutes.
